violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Metal pans of food being stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw ground pork sausage patties were stored above the raw whole pork cuts in the reach-in cooler on the cook line.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Inside of the walk-in cooler door is patched with duct tape and is not a cleanable surface.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Need to install a barrier between the handwash sink on the server line and the ice bin.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the stand-up freezer needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Underneath the cooking equipment on the cook-line, all storage racks in the kitchen and shelving on the cook-line need to be cleaned.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The hand sink in the back of the kitchen was leaking at the time of inspection. Hand sink on the server line was backed up and not functioning at the time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Piece of bare wood by the dish machine is not a cleanable surface. Shelving on the server line is chipped and broken and is no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in freezer and coolers floors need to be cleaned. Floors and wall in the kitchen and under the equipment need to be cleaned.
